word: G3920 - παρείσακτος - pareísaktos - par-ice'-ak-tos - Unawares brought in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: παρείσακτος

- Transliteration: Pareisaktos

- Phonetic: par-ice'-ak-tos

- Definition:

1. secretly or surreptitiously brought in

2. one who has stolen in

- Origin: from G3919

- TDNT entry: 18:44,8

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G3919; smuggled in: - unawares brought in.
